# Acme Corporation — Information Governance Policy

Acme Corporation is a global industrial manufacturer. This Information Governance
Policy is approved and governed by the Board of Directors.

## Data Retention

All financial records must be retained for seven years. Acme Corporation reports
its annual revenue in its 10-K filing for fiscal year 2025.

## Subsidiaries

Acme Robotics is a subsidiary of Acme Corporation. Jane Smith is employed by
Acme Robotics, where she serves as Chief Financial Officer.

## Risk Factors

Acme Corporation is exposed to supply chain risk and to currency exchange risk,
both of which may affect reported earnings.

## Products

Acme Corporation offers industrial automation systems and the SafeGuard
compliance platform to enterprise customers.
